auth.loginBody: Sign in with your email and password.
auth.workspaceBody: Bring VEETI data, corrections, and forecast work into one flow.
auth.workspacePointBaseline: Bring in the utility's data from VEETI.
auth.workspacePointForecast: Correct figures manually or from a PDF when needed.
auth.workspacePointReports: Add future investments and see what they mean for the water price.
auth.demoLoginFailed: Demo sign-in failed. Try Demo again.
auth.demoRetryAfterReset: Demo data was reset. Click "Try Demo" again.
auth.demoStatusAvailableHint: Use Try Demo to open the demo workspace.
auth.demoStatusLoadingHint: Checking whether demo access is available in this environment.
auth.demoStatusUnavailableHint: Sign in to this environment with a normal user account.
auth.demoStatusUnreachableHint: The backend is not responding, so demo access cannot be confirmed.
auth.loadingSubtitle: Checking workspace access and current legal status.
auth.errorSubtitle: Reload the workspace entry and try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please wait and try again.

demo.banner: DEMO MODE  Authentication disabled. Data will not persist.
demo.resetConfirm: Reset all demo data? This will delete all budgets, revenue data, and projections.
demo.resetTitle: Clear all demo data and sign in again

status.apiWarningYellow: API is up but database is temporarily unavailable.

invite.title: Set Password
invite.subtitle: Activate this workspace invitation
invite.body: Set a password to continue into the customer workspace.
invite.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

legal.loadingSubtitle: Preparing the current terms and DPA for this workspace.
legal.title: Legal acceptance required
legal.subtitle: Accept the current terms before entering this workspace.
legal.body: Review the current Terms and DPA for this customer workspace, then confirm to continue.
legal.waitingForAdmin: Accepted. Waiting for organization admin to unlock tenant.

budget.title: Budget
budget.importCreateBudgetHint: The file will be imported into this budget. You can name it and choose the year.
budget.noDataHint: Create a budget to start financial planning.
budget.emptyDraftHint: Create a budget to save, or load demo data.
budget.loadFailedAfterImport: Budget created but loading details failed. Try selecting it from the list or refresh.
budget.name: Name
budget.vesimaksutFormula: Water fees = (Water €/m³ × m³) + (Wastewater €/m³ × m³) + Base fees + Other revenue
budget.emptySectionHint: No lines. Add a line or import from file.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.noBudgetHint: Create a budget first (Budget tab) to save revenue data.
revenue.noDriversHint: Add water price and sold volume to calculate revenue.
revenue.formula: Water fees = unit price × sold volume

projection.title: Projection
projection.createScenarioContext: Create an alternative case from the baseline and compute it immediately.
projection.scenarioSecondaryHint: Baseline is active. Create a scenario to test investments and water-price/volume changes.
projection.deleteConfirm: Delete scenario "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

verdict.title: Assessment
verdict.sustainableDesc: All years in surplus. Finances are on solid ground.
verdict.unsustainableDesc: Multiple deficit years. Price increases or cost cuts needed.

financing.saveInvestmentsThenRecalculate: Save investments, then press Recalculate to update the forecast.

projection.noDataHint: Create a budget and set revenue data to generate a projection.
projection.bootstrapPendingHint: No scenario is available yet. Retry bootstrap to create the baseline projection automatically.
projection.noDriversForCompute: Enter water and wastewater unit price and volume in the driver planner (Tuloajureiden suunnittelu), save, then compute.
projection.noDriversHintTable: Water price and volume are 0. Add revenue drivers in Input, then recompute the projection.
projection.noBudgets: No budgets. Create a budget first.
projection.noBudgetScaffold: No budget yet. Create a budget (Budget tab) or load demo data to create scenarios.

charts.tariffHint: Primary view: required water price trajectory over years.

projection.showTableTooltip: Switch between table and diagram views

topDrivers.title: Why does it look like this?

projection.revenueReportPurpose: Detailed breakdown by source. Suitable for print and export.
projection.horizonChangedNotice: Horizon changed. Press Recompute to update the projection.
projection.error404ComputeFallback: Scenario not found. Recomputing from budget baseline.
projection.historyVolumeHint: V1: KVA import does not include sold volume, so volume is entered manually per year. Active baseline year volume affects projection after Recompute.

driverPlanner.title: Revenue driver planning
driverPlanner.description: Set water and wastewater unit price and sold volume by year, or apply annual % change from a selected base year.
driverPlanner.saveBeforeCompute: Save driver inputs before computing projection.
driverPlanner.saveDriversThenRecalculate: Save revenue driver changes above (Save in Revenue driver planning), then press Recalculate.

v2.volumeHint: Historical values are entered manually. The next 3 forecast years can be entered separately.
v2.onboardingHint: Start with baseline-year price and volume drivers, then adjust assumptions and investments, and finally compute the projection.
v2.kpiCombinedWeightedHelp: Formula (weighted by water and wastewater volumes)
v2.personnelManualHint: Personnel costs: next 3 years can be edited separately
v2.lineOverrideEmpty: No rows available for selected year.

v2Shell.subtitle: Financial planning
v2Shell.legalHint: Legal acceptance and trial logic follow current backend behavior.
v2Shell.clearDataHint: Admin tool: clears VEETI imports, Vesinvest plans, and forecast scenarios for this org.
v2Shell.clearDataConfirm: This clears all VEETI imports and forecast scenarios for your organization. Continue?
v2Shell.clearDataTypeHint: For safety, type {{token}} in the confirmation prompt.
v2Shell.clearDataTypeMismatch: Confirmation text did not match. Database was not cleared.
v2Shell.tabLockedHint: Complete the setup steps before opening this workspace.
v2Shell.workspaceLoadingBody: Loading the latest workspace status before opening this view.
v2Shell.orgLanguageSwitched: Organization language is {{language}}. The workspace switched automatically.
v2Shell.orgLanguageKept: Organization language is {{language}}. Keeping your chosen interface language.

v2TariffPlan.acceptBeforeReports: Accept the tariff plan before opening reports.
v2TariffPlan.acceptVisibleBeforeReport: Save and accept the visible tariff changes before creating a report.
v2TariffPlan.scenarioRequired: Sync the asset-management plan to forecast before tariff planning.
v2TariffPlan.unsavedAcceptedHint: Visible tariff changes must be accepted before they can be reported.

v2Forecast.staleComputeHint: Saved inputs changed after the last calculation. Recompute results before creating report.
v2Forecast.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes. Save and compute results before creating report.
v2Forecast.classificationReviewRequired: Review and save the Vesinvest class plan before creating a report.
v2Forecast.depreciationSnapshotsMissingHint: Refresh the synced Vesinvest class plan and recompute results before creating report.
v2Forecast.depreciationSnapshotsMissing: Depreciation snapshots are missing for years: {{years}}
v2Forecast.depreciationMappingBlockedHint: Complete and save a depreciation rule for every investment year before creating report.
v2Forecast.stateBannerCurrent: These results reflect the current saved inputs.
v2Forecast.stateBannerUnsaved: You have unsaved edits. KPI cards and report controls still reflect the previous saved version.
v2Forecast.stateBannerNeedsRecompute: Your latest saved scenario has not been recomputed yet. KPI cards and report controls still reflect the previous calculation.
v2Forecast.stateBannerComputing: A new calculation is running. KPI cards and report controls stay on the previous completed result until the run finishes.
v2Forecast.sidebarIntro: Pick the working scenario before editing assumptions.
v2Forecast.scenarioRailBody: Choose a scenario, branch it when needed, and start from the funding summary before opening detailed workbenches.
v2Forecast.branchingHint: Create a blank scenario or branch the selected one before editing.
v2Forecast.branchingHintSelected: Copy branches from the currently selected scenario so stress cases inherit its assumptions and investments.
v2Forecast.firstScenarioBody: The planning baseline is ready. Create the first scenario here to start with funding pressure, investments, and tariff impact instead of an empty scenario shelf.
v2Forecast.executiveHeroBody: Start with price pressure, underfunding timing, and scenario status before opening detailed planning workbenches.
v2Forecast.editorIntro: Use this scenario to test assumptions, investments, and fee pressure before computing results.
v2Forecast.baselineContextMissing: Baseline provenance becomes visible after a scenario is loaded.
v2Forecast.requiredIncreaseFromToday: Required increase from current combined price
v2Forecast.investmentGuardrailHint: Investment values are normalized to non-negative whole euros (max 1,000,000,000).
v2Forecast.investmentProgramHint: Start with the next five years in utility language. Save the total directly, or split it between water and wastewater when that helps the discussion.
v2Forecast.investmentProgramGroupJointNewNetwork: New network together with the technical department
v2Forecast.investmentProgramGroupJointRehabNetwork: Rehabilitation of the current network together with the technical department
v2Forecast.investmentProgramGroupOwnRehabNetwork: Rehabilitation of the current network, own projects
v2Forecast.investmentImpactHint: After save and recompute, these same inputs flow into yearly investments, depreciation, tariff pressure, and cash impact.
v2Forecast.investmentProgramContinueHint: The same saved rows continue into depreciation plans and the full annual table below.
v2Forecast.investmentNearTermHint: Start with the next five years. Long-range blocks and the full annual table stay available below when you need them.
v2Forecast.investmentLongRangeHint: Open a five-year block only when you need to edit the later horizon in more detail.
v2Forecast.investmentAnalystTools: Full annual table and analyst tools
v2Forecast.feeSufficiencySnapshotHint: Compare current pricing against the required fee level and underfunding timing before editing the detailed controls below.
v2Forecast.infoDraftSaved: Draft saved. Recompute results to refresh KPI values.
v2Forecast.errorMissingBaselineBudget: No trusted baseline budget found. Complete Overview import and sync first.
v2Forecast.errorRecomputeRequired: Report can only be created from the latest computed scenario. Recompute scenario and try again.
v2Forecast.assumptionsLockedHint: Assumption percentages are fixed to VEETI baseline values in V2.
v2Forecast.nearTermExpenseHint: Set expected expense growth for the baseline year and next 3 years. Values are percentages (for example 3.5 means 3.5%).
v2Forecast.nearTermValidationSummary: Fix highlighted near-term percentage fields before saving or computing.
v2Forecast.createBlockedMissingBaselineHint: Complete Overview import and sync first to create scenarios.
v2Forecast.baselineContextWarning: Baseline year is partial. Forecast confidence is lower until data is complete.
v2Forecast.planningInputsHint: Adjust near-term expenses, investments, and depreciation before reviewing forecast results.
v2Forecast.depreciationRulesHint: Define how each investment group is written off, then save the plan for the years above.
v2Forecast.depreciationRulesEmpty: No depreciation plans yet. Add the first rule below.
v2Forecast.investmentNeedsDepreciationRule: Select a depreciation rule before saving this investment.
v2Forecast.investmentMissingDepreciationRule: This investment points to a depreciation rule that is not available right now.
v2Forecast.depreciationRuleKeyRequired: An internal key is required for each depreciation rule.
v2Forecast.classAllocationTitle: Set a depreciation plan for each investment year
v2Forecast.classAllocationHint: Each investment year needs one saved plan before reporting.
v2Forecast.classAllocationNoRules: Add at least one depreciation rule below before mapping years.
v2Forecast.defaultMappingSuggestion: Default suggestion ready: {{label}}. Save depreciation plans to keep it for {{year}}.
v2Forecast.mappingRequiresSaveHint: Reports stay blocked until this investment year has a saved depreciation rule.
v2Forecast.outputsHint: Use comparison, price path, and cumulative cash to judge when the current plan runs out of room.
v2Forecast.outputsProvenanceHint: Keep the same baseline source mix visible while comparing scenarios and reviewing charts.
v2Forecast.riskPresetLowerVolumeHint: Adds a stronger volume decline to the current scenario.
v2Forecast.riskPresetHigherOpexHint: Raises non-energy operating cost growth in the near term and thereafter.
v2Forecast.riskPresetHigherEnergyHint: Raises energy cost growth in the near term and thereafter.
v2Forecast.riskPresetHigherCapexHint: Increases yearly investments and long-run investment growth.
v2Forecast.riskPresetDelayedFeeIncreaseHint: Freezes automatic price growth so tariff action is delayed.
v2Forecast.riskPresetFinancingPressureHint: Combines delayed fee reaction with higher capex and lower volume.
v2Forecast.baseComparisonBaseSelected: This is the base scenario. Open a stress scenario to compare the fee and cash outcomes.
v2Forecast.riskSummaryPending: Create or open a stress scenario to see a short explanation of how the funding pressure changes versus the base case.
v2Forecast.riskSummaryStable: The selected scenario stays close to the base case. Funding pressure does not materially worsen versus the base scenario.
v2Forecast.riskSummaryStress: Compared with the base scenario, this stress case raises required fee level by {{priceDelta}}, changes the annual increase need by {{increaseDelta}}, and worsens cumulative cash by {{gapDelta}}.
v2Forecast.reportReadyHint: Latest computed scenario can be published as a report.
v2Forecast.pricePathHint: Review baseline-to-horizon tariff movement before finalizing the report output.
v2Forecast.cashflowHint: Use the horizon-end and lowest-cash checkpoints to judge financing resilience before report creation.
v2Forecast.statementCockpitHint: Review the baseline, plan, and change before opening the detailed planning views.
v2Forecast.statementSummaryHint: These rows stay visible before the longer assumption and investment editors.
v2Forecast.statementPillarsHint: Use the five planning areas to choose the next detailed view.
v2Forecast.statementComparisonHint: Compare the derived result rows between the base scenario and the active scenario before finalizing the report path.
v2Forecast.pillarComparisonHint: Review the five planning areas as one comparison table instead of jumping back through separate drill-downs.
v2Forecast.revenueWorkbenchHint: Adjust tariffs and sold volumes here, then return to the overview to review the income statement.
v2Forecast.revenueWorkbenchTariffHint: Review current versus horizon prices before recomputing the scenario.
v2Forecast.revenueWorkbenchVolumeHint: Keep baseline and horizon sold-volume context visible while adjusting the annual volume path.
v2Forecast.workbenchOverviewHint: Keep the funding summary visible while adjusting one cost area at a time.
v2Forecast.workbenchEditHint: Edit one cost area here without losing the surrounding funding context.
v2Forecast.analystModeHint: Dense analyst mode compresses the yearly editor for faster scanning.
v2Forecast.materialsWorkbenchHint: Adjust the energy-driven materials path year by year while keeping the funding summary nearby.
v2Forecast.personnelWorkbenchHint: Edit the personnel-cost path in one dense surface, then return to the overview when the yearly profile looks right.
v2Forecast.otherOpexWorkbenchHint: Tune the remaining operating-cost path separately so the overview can keep a cleaner income-statement view.
v2Forecast.depreciationWorkbenchHint: Choose the depreciation rule, method, and useful life for future investments, then review the tariff and cash impact before reporting.
v2Forecast.depreciationPreviewHint: Baseline, new-investment, and total depreciation stay visible while you adjust item rules and category defaults.
v2Forecast.depreciationPreviewMissing: Compute the scenario to see the yearly depreciation preview.
v2Forecast.depreciationImpactHint: Keep the funding consequence visible while you adjust item rules and depreciation classes.
v2Forecast.allInvestmentsMapped: Every investment year has a saved depreciation plan.
v2Forecast.loadingScenariosHint: Loading scenario list and baseline context.
v2Forecast.selectScenarioHint: Choose an existing scenario or create a new one to continue.
v2Forecast.reportRequiresActiveVesinvestPlan: Select an active Vesinvest revision before creating a report.
v2Forecast.depreciationRulesUnavailable: Depreciation rules are missing for this scenario. Refresh the scenario before saving investment years.

v2Overview.infoNoSearchResults: No organizations found. Try a business ID or a longer name.
v2Overview.infoConnected: Utility linked. Select historical years and build the baseline before Forecast opens.
v2Overview.infoSyncWithSkips: Sync done: {{synced}} year(s) updated, {{skipped}} skipped. Check year notes below.
v2Overview.importWizardIntro: Follow three steps: connect organization, choose years, then run import.
v2Overview.importStepOneHelp: Search by name or business ID and connect the right organization.
v2Overview.importStepTwoHelp: Review year readiness and select the years to sync.
v2Overview.importStepThreeHelp: Confirm selected organization and years, then start sync.
v2Overview.connectHelp: Step 1: search and connect your organization. Step 2: sync eligible years.
v2Overview.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or business ID
v2Overview.syncSelectedButton: Sync selected years and create budgets
v2Overview.yearReasonMissingTariffRevenue: Base-fee revenue is needed to reconcile tariff revenue.
v2Overview.yearReasonTariffRevenueMismatch: Tariff revenue does not reconcile with prices, volumes, and base-fee revenue.
v2Overview.yearWarningFallbackZero: Missing VEETI values default to 0 in calculations.
v2Overview.yearSelectionHint: {{count}} year(s) are not sync-ready yet. See reasons under each year.
v2Overview.yearSelectionLocked: Connect an organization first to review and select years.
v2Overview.blockedYearsHelp: Complete missing fields in VEETI for these years, then run sync again.
v2Overview.requirementTariffRevenue: Base-fee revenue is needed to reconcile tariff revenue
v2Overview.requirementTariffRevenueMismatch: Tariff revenue does not reconcile with prices, volumes, and base-fee revenue
v2Overview.manualPatchAdminOnlyHint: Manual completion is available for admins only.
v2Overview.manualPatchBody: Fill missing required fields, save, and optionally sync this year immediately.
v2Overview.documentImportWorkflowBody: Upload one source PDF, review the detected values, and confirm them into the year repair flow.
v2Overview.statementImportWorkflowBody: Upload the bookkeeping PDF, review the detected financial statement values, and confirm the import. Other datasets keep their current source.
v2Overview.workbookImportWorkflowBody: Upload one KVA workbook, review the matched years, and choose row by row whether to keep VEETI or apply workbook values before saving.
v2Overview.qdisImportWorkflowBody: Upload the QDIS PDF, review the detected prices and sold volumes, and confirm them into the year patch flow.
v2Overview.statementImportBody: Upload the bookkeeping PDF. OCR scans the first pages, detects the result statement, and pre-fills the financial statement fields below for review.
v2Overview.documentImportConfirmAndSync: Confirm source PDF and sync year
v2Overview.documentImportStarting: Preparing source-document import from the uploaded PDF...
v2Overview.documentImportDone: Document import finished. Review the detected values before saving.
v2Overview.qdisImportStarting: Preparing QDIS import for the uploaded PDF...
v2Overview.qdisImportDone: QDIS import finished. Review the detected prices and volumes before saving.
v2Overview.workbookImportStarting: Preparing workbook comparison from the uploaded Excel file...
v2Overview.workbookImportDone: Workbook comparison is ready. Review the matched years and choose which values to keep before saving.
v2Overview.workbookImportConfirmAndSync: Apply workbook choices and sync years
v2Overview.workbookImportNoPreview: Upload the KVA workbook and review the comparison before saving workbook choices.
v2Overview.workbookImportNoSelection: Choose at least one workbook value to apply before saving workbook choices.
v2Overview.qdisImportConfirmAndSync: Confirm QDIS import and sync year
v2Overview.workbookImportDiffTitle: VEETI and workbook values by year
v2Overview.qdisImportDiffTitle: VEETI, QDIS PDF, and current values
v2Overview.statementImportDiffBody: Check what the PDF proposes against the original VEETI row and the current effective year before you confirm or sync.
v2Overview.documentImportAwaitingFile: Upload a source PDF before confirming the import.
v2Overview.statementImportAwaitingFile: Upload the statement PDF to populate the OCR comparison before confirming the import.
v2Overview.statementImportNoMappedValues: OCR did not produce mapped financial values yet. Upload another PDF before confirming the import.
v2Overview.workbookImportAwaitingFile: Upload the KVA workbook to populate the year-by-year comparison before saving any workbook choices.
v2Overview.qdisImportAwaitingFile: Upload the QDIS PDF to populate the price and volume comparison before confirming the import.
v2Overview.qdisImportNoMappedValues: QDIS PDF import did not detect prices or sold volumes yet. Upload another PDF before confirming the import.
v2Overview.manualPatchFinancialsRequired: Revenue (Liikevaihto) must be greater than zero.
v2Overview.manualPatchPricesRequired: At least one unit price must be greater than zero.
v2Overview.manualPatchVolumesRequired: At least one sold volume must be greater than zero.
v2Overview.manualPatchSaved: Year {{year}} was patched. Run sync to create/update baseline budget.
v2Overview.manualFinancialYearResultHint: Update this saved Year result field directly when the year result must differ from the calculated value.
v2Overview.manualFinancialYearResultDerivedNote: Calculated from the saved financial basis for the year.
v2Overview.manualFinancialYearResultOverrideActive: The stored result differs from the derived value.
v2Overview.manualPatchReasonPlaceholder: Optional note describing why this year is edited manually
v2Overview.deleteYearConfirm: Remove imported year {{year}}? This deletes imported snapshots and generated VEETI budgets for that year.
v2Overview.resultFormulaNote: Result comes from VEETI year result (TilikaudenYlijäämä). Other result items reconcile revenue, operating costs, and result.
v2Overview.importReviewLocked: Connect an organization before starting import.
v2Overview.reviewNeedsYears: Select at least one sync-ready year to enable import.
v2Overview.nextStepBody: Move to Forecast to model future investments and price impact.
v2Overview.nextStepConnectBody: Search your organization by name or business ID, select it, then connect.
v2Overview.nextStepSyncBody: Import the latest sync-ready VEETI years to create baseline budgets.
v2Overview.nextStepFixBody: Some years are blocked because required VEETI datasets are missing. Review missing fields and complete data before syncing again.
v2Overview.nextStepScenarioBody: Open Forecast and create your first scenario from synced baseline data.
v2Overview.nextStepComputeBody: Open Forecast and compute a scenario to generate updated result paths.
v2Overview.nextStepReportBody: Open Forecast, compute the selected scenario, and create a report.
v2Overview.nextStepReviewBody: Open Reports to review generated outputs and share PDF artifacts.
v2Overview.readinessTitle: Build a trusted baseline before forecasting
v2Overview.readinessBody: Review connected VEETI years, confirm what is trustworthy, and fix blocked years before you move to Forecast.
v2Overview.reviewWorkspaceTitle: Review trusted years before you build the forecast baseline
v2Overview.reviewWorkspaceBody: Inspect each year, select the one you want to review in detail, and compare VEETI against the current applied values before moving on.
v2Overview.yearReviewActionsBody: Choose whether to keep the current year values, import a statement PDF, edit applied values, or restore the VEETI financial row.
v2Overview.financialComparisonBody: Review how the current year differs from the original VEETI financial row before saving changes.
v2Overview.priceComparisonBody: Review raw VEETI prices against the current effective prices before saving or restoring this section.
v2Overview.volumeComparisonBody: Review raw VEETI sold volumes against the current effective values before saving or restoring this section.
v2Overview.yearDetailBody: Review the imported year calmly before deciding what to edit, restore from VEETI, or keep as-is.
v2Overview.yearDetailExcludedBody: This year is excluded from the planning baseline, but you can still review the imported values and restore it when needed.
v2Overview.previewVeetiMissingValue: VEETI did not provide this value
v2Overview.keepCurrentYearValuesInfo: No changes were applied for this year.
v2Overview.manualPatchLoadFailed: Failed to load year data for editing.
v2Overview.manualPatchNoChanges: No changes detected. Update at least one field before saving.
v2Overview.statementImportStarting: Preparing OCR import for the uploaded statement PDF...
v2Overview.statementImportDone: OCR import finished. Review the prefilled values before saving.
v2Overview.reconcileFailed: Failed to apply VEETI values for the selected year.
v2Overview.deleteYearsBulkConfirm: Remove selected imported years: {{years}}? This also prevents those years from returning on sync until restored.
v2Overview.excludedYearsLabel: Excluded years (not shown in sync until restored)
v2Overview.excludeYearsBulkConfirm: Exclude years {{years}} from the plan? The years stay in the workspace and can be restored later.
v2Overview.excludeYearsBulkPartial: Excluded {{excluded}} year(s) from the plan. {{skipped}} year(s) were already excluded: {{years}}.
v2Overview.excludeYearsBulkFailed: Failed to exclude selected years from the plan.
v2Overview.restoreYearsBulkPartial: Restored {{restored}} year(s). {{missing}} year(s) were not excluded.
v2Overview.yearSyncSelectionActive: Included in the current sync selection.
v2Overview.yearSyncSelectionReady: Ready to add to the current sync selection.
v2Overview.importableYearsBody: These years have the VEETI data needed for import. Review them before they become planning baseline years.
v2Overview.repairOnlyYearsBody: These years are not importable yet. Fix missing inputs first so they do not compete with the primary import list.
v2Overview.infoImportYearsDone: Imported years are now in the workspace: {{years}}.
v2Overview.setupStatusReadyHint: This year can be used in the planning baseline.
v2Overview.setupStatusExcludedHint: This year is excluded from the plan, but it remains in the workspace.
v2Overview.setupStatusExcludedShort: Not included in the planning baseline
v2Overview.reviewYearsEmpty: Select at least one year in step 2 to see year readiness.
v2Overview.reviewContinueReadyHint: The years are ready. Planning baseline creation comes next.
v2Overview.reviewContinueBlockedHint: Years that still need attention will open next for detailed decisions.
v2Overview.reviewContinueReadyBody: All imported years are reviewed. Next, create the planning baseline.
v2Overview.reviewContinueTechnicalReadyBody: These years are still waiting for review and approval: {{years}}.
v2Overview.excludeYearConfirm: Exclude year {{year}} from the plan? The year stays in the workspace and can be restored later.
v2Overview.excludeYearDoneSingle: Year {{year}} is now excluded from the plan.
v2Overview.excludeYearFailedSingle: Excluding the year from the plan failed.
v2Overview.excludeYearFailed: Excluding the year from the plan failed.
v2Overview.restoreYearDone: Year {{year}} has been restored to the plan.
v2Overview.restoreYearFailed: Restoring the year to the plan failed.
v2Overview.yearDecisionBody: Keep the year included, fix the values, or exclude it from the plan. Excluding it does not remove the year permanently.
v2Overview.yearDecisionAction: What should happen to this year?
v2Overview.manualPatchExcludedBody: This year is currently excluded from the plan. You can restore it or fix the data before restoring it.
v2Overview.setupStatusTechnicalReadyHint: The key accounting rows are visible on the card. Review the comparison and approve the year into the planning baseline when the numbers match.
v2Overview.setupStatusReviewedHint: This year has been reviewed and approved into the planning baseline.
v2Overview.trustLaneReadyBody: You can select these years now and review them right after import.
v2Overview.trustLaneSuspiciousBody: Only select these years if you review the missing or unusual data before baseline creation.
v2Overview.trustLaneBlockedBody: Fill in the missing prices or volumes before you select these years for import.
v2Overview.trustLaneParkedBody: These years stay available, but they are intentionally parked outside the current import selection.
v2Overview.trustParkedYearHint: This year stays available in the workspace, but it is not part of the current import selection.
v2Overview.inlineCardDirtyGuard: Save or cancel this year before moving to another card.
v2Overview.trustLooksPlausibleHint: VEETI supplied every main card row for this year.
v2Overview.trustNeedsReviewHint: This year includes manual or mixed-source corrections on top of VEETI.
v2Overview.trustSuspiciousResultHint: The result sits far from zero relative to revenue and should be checked before import.
v2Overview.trustMissingKeyCostsHint: VEETI did not provide these card rows: {{fields}}.
v2Overview.trustFallbackZerosHint: VEETI did not provide every required dataset for this year.
v2Overview.yearTrustMaterialChange: Corrected year differs from VEETI in: {{fields}}.
v2Overview.yearResultExplicitFieldNote: The result row follows the saved Year result field.
v2Overview.yearActionsBody: Choose whether to keep the year as-is, edit it manually, restore it from VEETI, or exclude/restore it from the planning baseline.
v2Overview.yearActionsReviewBody: Approve the year as-is after reviewing the comparison, or open editing only when something really needs to change.
v2Overview.yearActionsFixBody: Choose whether to correct the year, restore VEETI values, or exclude the year from the planning baseline.
v2Overview.yearActionsExcludedBody: Review the imported values and decide whether the year should return to the plan or stay excluded.
v2Overview.reviewModeHint: Edit fields stay hidden until you choose "Fix values". Start by reviewing the comparison and deciding what to do with the year.
v2Overview.importedYearsPending: Select at least one year in step 2 to see what is included in the workspace.
v2Overview.manualPatchSaved: Year {{year}} was updated. You can now continue toward the planning baseline.
v2Overview.manualPatchSavedNeedsReview: Year {{year}} was saved. Review is still incomplete: {{reason}}
v2Overview.manualPatchSavedStillBlocked: Year {{year}} was saved. Review is still incomplete.
v2Overview.wizardBodyConnect: Search the VEETI utility and connect it to this workspace.
v2Overview.wizardQuestionImportYears: Choose historical years for the baseline
v2Overview.wizardBodyImportYears: Start with four consecutive historical years. Keep the current year as an optional estimate.
v2Overview.baselineThinHint: Only {{count}} consecutive historical years are available right now.
v2Overview.wizardStepOneHelp: Search the VEETI utility by name or business ID.
v2Overview.wizardStepTwoHelp: Choose the years to import into this workspace.
v2Overview.wizardBodyReviewYears: Group the imported years by readiness, pin the years you want side by side, and fix only the years that still need work.
v2Overview.wizardBodyReviewYear: Review the comparison calmly and approve the year as-is if nothing needs to change.
v2Overview.wizardQuestionFixYear: Choose the next action for this year
v2Overview.wizardBodyFixYear: Keep the year, correct the values, or exclude the year from the planning baseline.
v2Overview.wizardBodyBaseline: Confirm the included years and corrected values before you create the planning baseline.
v2Overview.wizardBodyForecast: The planning baseline is ready. Review the years and open Forecast.
v2Overview.wizardBaselineReadyHint: Planning baseline is available for the next step.
v2Overview.wizardBaselinePendingHint: Forecast and Reports stay locked until you create the planning baseline.
v2Overview.wizardContextConnectNextBody: Choose the years to bring into the workspace after connection.
v2Overview.wizardContextImportNextBody: Imported years move into one readiness review surface.
v2Overview.wizardContextImportedWorkspaceYearsBody: Imported workspace years: {{years}}. Review them in the same setup flow before building the planning baseline.
v2Overview.wizardContextReviewNextOneBody: 1 year still needs a decision before baseline creation.
v2Overview.wizardContextReviewNextManyBody: {{count}} years still need decisions before baseline creation.
v2Overview.wizardContextReviewNextReadyBody: Ready years can continue straight to baseline creation.
v2Overview.wizardContextReviewQueueBody: Year {{year}} was opened from the readiness review.
v2Overview.wizardContextFixNextReviewBody: After this decision, the wizard returns to the remaining review queue.
v2Overview.wizardContextFixNextBaselineBody: After this decision, the wizard can continue from review into baseline creation.
v2Overview.wizardContextBaselineNextBody: Creating the planning baseline unlocks the forecast handoff.
v2Overview.baselineBlockedHint: Fix or exclude problem years before creating the planning baseline.
v2Overview.baselineReadyHint: These reviewed years are ready for baseline creation. Forecast and Reports stay locked until you create it.
v2Overview.baselineClosureNoCorrections: No corrected years are queued right now.
v2Overview.baselineClosureNoVeetiCarryForward: No VEETI carry-forward remains for the corrected years.
v2Overview.baselineClosureQueuedBody: Create the planning baseline for {{years}}. Forecast and Reports stay locked until that happens.
v2Overview.planningBaselineDone: Planning baseline was created from years {{years}}.
v2Overview.planningBaselineFailed: Failed to create the planning baseline.
v2Overview.starterScenarioHint: You can go straight to Forecast or create the first scenario here first.
v2Overview.selectedYearEmpty: Select a reviewed year to compare VEETI and current values.

v2Vesinvest.title: Vesinvest VEETI-first workspace
v2Vesinvest.subtitle: Connect the VEETI utility first, then build the investment plan, verify baseline evidence, and open fee-path output when the baseline is ready.
v2Vesinvest.baselineVerifiedHint: Pricing can now be synced from the plan.
v2Vesinvest.baselineIncompleteHint: Verify VEETI, PDF, workbook, or manual evidence before fee-path output is treated as final.
v2Vesinvest.pricingReadyHint: Sync the plan to open fee-path and financing results.
v2Vesinvest.pricingPlanMissingHint: Add investment rows and yearly allocations before fee-path and financing output can be opened.
v2Vesinvest.pricingBlockedHint: Fee-path and financing output stay blocked until the baseline is verified.
v2Vesinvest.veetiLookupPlaceholder: Search by business ID or utility name
v2Vesinvest.veetiLookupQueryRequired: Enter at least two characters before searching VEETI.
v2Vesinvest.useLinkedIdentity: Bring company name / org ID from VEETI
v2Vesinvest.planChangedSincePricing: Investment plan changed since the last fee-path result.
v2Vesinvest.planAlignedWithPricing: Saved fee-path result still matches this revision.
v2Vesinvest.planUnsavedDraft: This revision is still a local draft until you save it.
v2Vesinvest.planNotYetSynced: Fee-path has not been opened from this revision yet.
v2Vesinvest.baselineChangedSincePricing: Accepted baseline changed after the saved fee-path result.
v2Vesinvest.identityGuardrailHint: Utility name, business ID, and identity source stay visible before pricing is opened.
v2Vesinvest.baselineBudgetPending: Fee-path link is created when pricing is opened from a verified baseline.
v2Vesinvest.evidenceEmpty: No accepted baseline years yet. Finish VEETI, PDF, or manual verification before pricing is treated as final.
v2Vesinvest.projectEmpty: No projects yet. Add the investment plan first, then connect baseline evidence later.
v2Vesinvest.errorProjectRequired: Project code and project name are required.
v2Vesinvest.allocationSummaryHint: Water and wastewater totals are derived from the yearly allocation split above.
v2Vesinvest.errorLoadPlan: Failed to load the selected plan.
v2Vesinvest.identityChangeConfirm: Change the utility identity for this saved Vesinvest plan? This clears the current fee-path result.
v2Vesinvest.unsavedChangesConfirm: Switch revision and discard the current unsaved Vesinvest edits?
v2Vesinvest.workflowCreatePlanBody: After the VEETI utility is connected, create the first plan revision and carry the linked identity into Vesinvest.
v2Vesinvest.workflowIdentifyUtilityBody: Search for the utility and link it. Then build an auditable baseline from historical years.
v2Vesinvest.workflowBuildPlanBody: After the VEETI utility is connected and the first plan revision exists, add project codes, groups, and yearly allocations across the horizon.
v2Vesinvest.workflowVerifyEvidenceBody: Use VEETI, PDF, workbook, or manual corrections to verify the accepted baseline that pricing will rely on.
v2Vesinvest.workflowOpenFeePathBody: When the baseline is verified, sync the plan to forecast to review price pressure, financing gaps, and the saved recommendation.
v2Vesinvest.workflowCreateReportBody: Create the report after the fee path is saved and the linked scenario is up to date.
v2Vesinvest.workflowCreatePlanNextBody: After the VEETI utility is connected, create the first plan revision.
v2Vesinvest.workflowIdentityPriorBody: The VEETI utility is now linked to this workspace and its identity carries into the plan.
v2Vesinvest.workflowIdentityNextBody: Save the first plan revision, then add project rows, codes, and yearly allocations across the full horizon.
v2Vesinvest.workflowBuildPlanPriorBody: The VEETI link and saved plan revision stay visible while the project register is being built.
v2Vesinvest.workflowBuildPlanNextBody: After the investment plan is in place, verify the accepted baseline through VEETI, PDF, workbook, or manual corrections.
v2Vesinvest.workflowEvidencePriorBody: The investment register stays as the source of truth while baseline evidence is reviewed and corrected.
v2Vesinvest.workflowEvidenceNextBody: Once the accepted baseline is verified, open the fee path from the plan to review pricing and financing pressure.
v2Vesinvest.workflowFeePathPriorBody: The accepted baseline is ready. Open the fee path from this revision to persist the pricing recommendation.
v2Vesinvest.workflowFeePathNextBody: After the fee path is saved and the linked scenario is current, create the report from the plan workspace.
v2Vesinvest.workflowReportPriorBody: The saved fee-path recommendation and linked scenario are ready for reporting.

v2Reports.title: Reports
v2Reports.emptyHint: Open Forecast, compute a scenario, and create your first report.
v2Reports.listHint: Review saved reports, variants, and PDF export state.
v2Reports.openForecastToSaveAndCompute: Open Forecast to save and compute
v2Reports.selectFromList: Select a report from the list.
v2Reports.baselineStatementWorkbookDetail: Statement-backed values and workbook repairs both affect this year.
v2Reports.errorDownloadPdfUnavailable: PDF export is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
v2Reports.downloadUsesSavedVariant: PDF download still uses the saved report variant. Switch back to that variant to export.
v2Reports.exportReady: Saved report is available for export.
v2Reports.variantPublicHint: Shows tariff path, grouped investment plan, and baseline context without the detailed assumptions or yearly investment rows.
v2Reports.variantConfidentialHint: Adds assumptions and detailed yearly investment rows on top of the grouped investment plan and summary.
v2Reports.requiredCombinedIncreaseFromCurrent: Required increase from current combined price
v2Reports.baselineSourceVeetiHint: Current report snapshot follows VEETI for this dataset.
v2Reports.baselineDocumentWorkbookDetail: Document-backed values and workbook repairs both affect this year.
v2Reports.baselineSourceMissingHint: No trusted dataset was available in the saved baseline.
v2Reports.loadingDetailHint: Loading the saved report snapshot and export state.

import.title: Import budget
import.dropHint: Select a CSV or Excel file

kva.previewIntro: Here's what we extracted from your Excel.
kva.confirmCopy: Your Excel produced these numbers per year before applying.
kva.validationYearNotExtracted: The selected year is not one of the years we extracted from the file. Please pick a year from the list above.
kva.validationSubtotalLinesRequired: No totals were extracted. Try uploading the file again or choose another Excel file with KVA totals.
kva.validationMissingBucket: Required buckets (Income, Costs, Depreciation) missing for the year. Add at least one line per bucket.
kva.requiredInputsHint: Water price and sold volume are required for both water and wastewater.
kva.veetiFetchCta: Fetch VEETI values for selected years
kva.veetiHint: Fills water/wastewater unit prices and sold volumes for selected years. You can still edit manually.
kva.veetiPartialData: VEETI data is partial for some required fields
kva.veetiInvalidOrgId: Enter a valid VEETI organization ID.
kva.veetiNoYears: Select years before using VEETI import.
